docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MILES, RODREK AS TO DEFENDANT MCGILL, ANTOINETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILES, RODREK AS TO DEFENDANT MCGILL, ANTOINETTE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
